# **Refill Summary – Today- 22/05/2026**  **Novo \- 0813**

# **Errors from the Engine Refill:**

# In packing, the pickup qty was not showing. Pepsi Black – 4 pcs Pepsi Regular – 3 pcs The system is saying there is no stock available, but physically the stock is available in the warehouse.

# That is why these items were packed manually and skipped in packing, because there was no option available in packing to confirm that these items were packed 

# 

# • **Vitamin Well – Well Care** expiry issue. System is showing expiry 28/06/2026 & 07/06/26 in refill, but central warehouse stock expiry is 06/09/2026. In daily refill it should pull the correct warehouse expiry stock, but currently it is showing the wrong expiry. 

# **Error in the Data: Needs to fix the warehouse, pods and log flow:**

# • Pepsi Regular – system showed 0 pickup qty, but stock was available and 3 pcs were refilled.(01/02/2027)

# • Pepsi Black – 4 pcs added Expiry: 29/10/2026

# 

# **Recommendation from driver on the ground:**

# • Replace Be Kind Bar with Barebells. Remove Be Kind Bar and add Barebells.

# **Errors from the Engine Refill:**

# • Products skipped in the system are actually being packed physically because qty is not showing properly while packing. Products are packed according to recommended units, but after 2 locations the exact qty and expiry are not visible in the system.

| **19/05/26** | **IFLY-1024** | **M2M swap** | The barebells 12 pieces came to the warehouse instead of going to AMZ machine.  |  |
| **21/05/26** | **OMDCW-1021** | **Returned items** | Returning 1 Hunter truffle from today’s dispatch, however it is showing as Hunter Sea Salt. When trying to change it “splitting by variant” it did not allow me to change the type and when managed to add 1 in the main box and changed to hunter truffle, we got an error,   ![][image1] |  |
| **21/05/26** | **MCC WH** | **Inventory Mgmt** | In the WH of MCC, we are finding Hunters, Organic Rice Cake, Perrier, that were never in the warehouse to begin with. Why is this happening, we need to understand the root case and address it.  |  |
